placeHint: Click a shape and place it on the canvas.
name: Name
saveTemplateDescription: Save the current selection so it appears in the figure catalog.
replaceTemplateWithSelection: Replace the contents with the current selection
deleteTemplateDescription: This template will be removed from the local catalog.
noSavedTemplates: There are no saved templates yet.
exportDescription: Copy the generated code, download it or share the exact same figure.
latexSettingsDescription: Adjust how the snippet and standalone file are generated.
latexWrapFigure: Wrap TikZ inside a figure environment
latexColorModeDescription: Choose how colors are encoded in the exported code.
latexColorDirectDescription: Uses RGB values directly in the figure, without extra definitions.
latexColorDefinedDescription: Declares colors with \definecolor and then reuses color names.
shareLinkReady: Link copied. Share it to open the full figure.
shareLinkImagesWarning: The link was copied, but images will not be included when sharing it.
confirmReplaceScene: This will replace the current scene. Do you want to continue?
confirmReplaceSceneDescription: This action will replace the current scene.
startDrawingHint: Pick a shape and place it on the canvas.
